message:
chore(ci): Update CI for per-project frozen architecture

- Remove update-frozen.yml workflow (frozen_functions now per-project)
- Remove build-frozen.sh script (no longer needed)
- Remove wamrc references (AOT compiler now built into edgeboxc)
- Update cache key to v5 (remove frozen_functions.o dependency)
- Update benchmark.yml comment
- Update test262.yml to skip external AOT (using WASM for tests)

files.patch:
@@ -68,8 +68,7 @@ runs:
           zig-out/cache/
           vendor/binaryen/
           vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/build/
-          vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/
-        key: edgebox-full-v4-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig', 'src/freeze/*.zig', 'bench/*.js', 'src/polyfills/*.js', 'zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o') }}
+        key: edgebox-full-v5-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig', 'src/freeze/*.zig', 'bench/*.js', 'src/polyfills/*.js') }}
 
     # === Build Binaryen (if cache miss) ===
     - name: Build Binaryen
@@ -109,7 +108,7 @@ runs:
       if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true' && inputs.build-benchmarks == 'true'
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        echo "Building all benchmarks (fast if frozen_functions.o is pre-compiled)..."
+        echo "Building all benchmarks..."
         for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive; do
           echo "Building $bench..."
           ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/$bench.js
@@ -129,5 +128,5 @@ runs:
     - name: Setup paths
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        # Add wamrc to PATH
-        echo "${{ github.workspace }}/vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+        # Add edgebox CLI to PATH
+        echo "${{ github.workspace }}/zig-out/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH

@@ -13,7 +13,6 @@ concurrency:
 jobs:
   # 5 parallel benchmark jobs
   # All share the same setup cache (setup-edgebox caches ALL outputs including benchmarks)
-  # Note: update-frozen.yml handles frozen_functions.o updates separately
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60  # First run needs ~45 min (build deps + benchmarks), cached ~5 min

@@ -50,9 +50,9 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Compile EdgeBox WASM to AOT
         run: |
-          vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/wamrc \
-            -o zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.aot \
-            zig-out/bin/edgebox-base.wasm
+          # AOT compiler is now built into edgeboxc - no external wamrc needed
+          # But for test262 we just use the WASM directly since we're testing correctness, not performance
+          echo "Skipping AOT for test262 (testing correctness, not performance)"
 
       - name: Build QuickJS-NG
         working-directory: vendor/quickjs-ng

@@ -1,49 +0,0 @@
-name: Update Frozen Functions
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - 'src/freeze/**'
-      - 'src/polyfills/**'
-      - 'vendor/quickjs-ng/**'
-      - 'scripts/build-frozen.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger
-
-jobs:
-  update-frozen:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 30
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          submodules: recursive
-          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-
-      - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
-
-      - name: Check and update frozen_functions.o
-        run: |
-          # Check if .o exists and hash matches
-          if ./scripts/build-frozen.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "up-to-date"; then
-            echo "frozen_functions.o is up-to-date, skipping"
-          else
-            echo "frozen_functions.o needs update, compiling (~18 min)..."
-            ./scripts/build-frozen.sh
-          fi
-
-      - name: Commit if changed
-        run: |
-          if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.*)" ]; then
-            git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
-            git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-            git add zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.sha256
-            git commit -m "chore: auto-update frozen_functions.o"
-            git push
-            echo "::notice::Committed updated frozen_functions.o"
-          else
-            echo "No changes to commit"
-          fi

@@ -1,95 +0,0 @@
-#!/bin/bash
-# Build frozen_functions.o from frozen_functions.c
-# Skips if already up-to-date (hash matches)
-#
-# Usage:
-#   ./scripts/build-frozen.sh           # Build only
-#   ./scripts/build-frozen.sh --commit  # Build and commit if changed
-
-set -euo pipefail
-
-SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
-ROOT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
-cd "$ROOT_DIR"
-
-FROZEN_C="zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.c"
-FROZEN_O="zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.o"
-FROZEN_HASH="zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.sha256"
-
-COMMIT=false
-for arg in "$@"; do
-    case $arg in
-        --commit) COMMIT=true ;;
-        *) echo "Unknown arg: $arg"; exit 1 ;;
-    esac
-done
-
-# Check if frozen_functions.c exists
-if [ ! -f "$FROZEN_C" ]; then
-    echo "ERROR: $FROZEN_C not found"
-    echo "Run 'zig build cli' first to generate it"
-    exit 1
-fi
-
-# Calculate current hash
-CURRENT_HASH=$(shasum -a 256 "$FROZEN_C" | awk '{print $1}')
-
-# Check if .o exists and hash matches
-if [ -f "$FROZEN_O" ] && [ -f "$FROZEN_HASH" ]; then
-    STORED_HASH=$(cat "$FROZEN_HASH")
-    if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" = "$STORED_HASH" ]; then
-        echo "frozen_functions.o is up-to-date (hash: ${CURRENT_HASH:0:12}...)"
-        exit 0
-    fi
-    echo "Hash mismatch - recompiling..."
-else
-    echo "frozen_functions.o missing or no hash - compiling..."
-fi
-
-# Compile frozen_functions.c to .o using zig's clang
-# Match the exact flags used by build.zig for wasm32-wasi target
-echo "Compiling frozen_functions.c (this takes ~18 minutes)..."
-START_TIME=$(date +%s)
-
-ZIG_PATH=$(which zig)
-ZIG_LIB_DIR="$(dirname "$ZIG_PATH")/../lib"
-
-"$ZIG_PATH" clang \
-    -target wasm32-wasi \
-    -O2 \
-    -DNDEBUG \
-    -D_GNU_SOURCE \
-    -fno-sanitize=undefined \
-    -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL \
-    -DCONFIG_BIGNUM=0 \
-    -I "$ROOT_DIR/vendor/quickjs-ng" \
-    -c "$FROZEN_C" \
-    -o "$FROZEN_O"
-
-END_TIME=$(date +%s)
-ELAPSED=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))
-echo "Compiled in ${ELAPSED}s"
-
-# Save hash
-echo "$CURRENT_HASH" > "$FROZEN_HASH"
-echo "Saved hash: ${CURRENT_HASH:0:12}..."
-
-# Show result
-ls -lh "$FROZEN_O"
-
-# Commit if requested
-if [ "$COMMIT" = true ]; then
-    if git diff --quiet "$FROZEN_O" "$FROZEN_HASH" 2>/dev/null; then
-        echo "No changes to commit"
-    else
-        echo "Committing frozen_functions.o..."
-        git add "$FROZEN_O" "$FROZEN_HASH"
-        git commit -m "chore: update pre-compiled frozen_functions.o
-
-Hash: ${CURRENT_HASH:0:12}
-Compile time: ${ELAPSED}s"
-        echo "Committed!"
-    fi
-fi
-
-echo "Done!"
